overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a Los Santos neighborhood on a sunny day. The character travels along commercial sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection, and passes by an auto dismantler and tire shop with downtown skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with car wash and retail storefronts

events.description: pedestrian in gray hoodie passes in front of camera walking same direction
character approaches intersection and prepares to cross

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing by storefronts and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in gray hoodie walking in same direction ahead of ego

entered.detail: tall vertical sign with blue background and white text reading CAR WASH with yellow arrow
row of storefronts with teal painted lower walls and metal security gates
trees with purple blossoms lining the sidewalk
tall palm trees visible further down the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with teal-fronted storefronts and a prominent car wash sign. Purple-flowering jacaranda trees and palm trees line the right side while pedestrians pass by occasionally.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic median

events.description: steps off sidewalk onto crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
pauses at median island to wait for vehicles to pass before continuing

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection, pausing at the median with palm tree planters before continuing to the opposite side

notable_agents.action: construction worker in orange vest and white hard hat crossing the street alongside ego

entered.detail: wide asphalt intersection with white painted crosswalk lines
concrete traffic median with large cylindrical planters containing palm trees
blue and yellow sign for auto dismantler business visible across the street
three large tires mounted on roof of tire shop building

segments.scene_description: Crossing a busy urban intersection with traffic moving through. The character pauses at a median featuring large palm tree planters before continuing across. An auto dismantler and tire shop become visible on the opposite corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with auto parts stores and industrial buildings

events.description: steps onto opposite sidewalk after completing the street crossing

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the auto dismantler and tire shop, continuing down the commercial street toward downtown

entered.detail: blue corrugated metal industrial building with yellow AUTO DISMANTLER lettering
red and white commercial building with large tires mounted on roof and PIPS signage
tall modern glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk past an auto dismantler business with large tires mounted on the roof. The street continues with commercial buildings, palm trees, and distant downtown skyscrapers visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny commercial district that transitions from a tree-lined sidewalk to a busy urban intersection and finally toward the distant city skyline. It begins by moving past teal-fronted storefronts and a car wash sign, flanked by purple-flowering jacaranda and palm trees. As the camera reaches the street, the scene shifts to a bustling intersection where the character pauses at a median with large palm tree planters before crossing through active traffic. The perspective then opens up to reveal an auto dismantler and tire shop on the opposite corner, moving past large tires mounted on the roof. Finally, the path continues along the commercial sidewalk, with the view expanding to show palm trees and the towering downtown skyscrapers visible in the distance.
